cards.back: Defined so that $i^2 = -1$. No real number squares to give $-1$, so $i$ extends the number system to include one.
A number of the form $a + bi$, where $a$ and $b$ are real numbers.
The real number $a$ in $a + bi$, written $\operatorname{Re}(z)$.
The real number $b$ in $a + bi$ (the *coefficient* of $i$, not $bi$ itself), written $\operatorname{Im}(z)$.
